verificationNote: Domain structure based on ASEAN Framework on Digital Data Governance themes. Content is indicative.

data-classification.name: Data Classification
data-classification.description: Standards for classifying data by sensitivity, criticality, and regulatory requirements across ASEAN jurisdictions

cross-border-transfers.name: Cross-Border Data Transfers
cross-border-transfers.description: Controls and mechanisms for lawful cross-border transfer of personal and regulated data within and outside ASEAN

model-contractual-clauses.name: Model Contractual Clauses
model-contractual-clauses.description: Standardized contractual frameworks for data sharing between ASEAN member states and with third countries

data-protection-standards.name: Data Protection Standards
data-protection-standards.description: Harmonized data protection technical and organizational standards across ASEAN frameworks

regulatory-harmonization.name: Regulatory Harmonization
regulatory-harmonization.description: Mechanisms for aligning regulatory requirements across ASEAN member states for digital data governance
